overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a forest trail at night. The character travels through a dark wooded area illuminated by moonlight, encounters a herd of deer crossing the path, and continues toward rocky outcrops.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the winding dirt path through the dark forest, swords visible on his back

entered.detail: winding dirt trail with patches of grass and gravel
tall pine trees lining the left side of the path
tall pine trees lining the right side of the path
dark night sky with clouds illuminated by moonlight
rocky hills visible in the distance through the trees

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow dirt trail through a dense forest at night. The path is flanked by tall pine trees on both sides, with moonlight filtering through the canopy above. The atmosphere is quiet and isolated, with rocky formations visible in the far distance ahead.

events.description: group of deer appears on the right side of the path in the grass
deer run across the path from right to left, fleeing from the character

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking forward as deer cross the path ahead, maintaining a steady pace

notable_agents.action: deer standing in the grass beside the path before being startled
deer running across the path from right to left

segments.scene_description: As Geralt continues along the trail, a group of deer appears on the right side of the path. The animals are startled and run across the path from right to left, disappearing into the vegetation. The forest opens slightly into a clearing, with rocky terrain becoming visible in the background.

events.description: trail transitions from dense forest to rocky terrain with large stone formations on the right

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the path with rocky cliffs rising on the right side, heading toward distant formations

entered.detail: large gray rock cliff face rising steeply beside the path
rocky wall formation along the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The trail transitions from dense forest to a more rocky landscape, with large stone cliffs and walls rising on the right side of the path. The vegetation becomes sparser as Geralt approaches the rocky outcrops visible in the distance. The path continues winding through this mountainous terrain under the dark night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, moonlit forest that gradually opens into a rugged, rocky landscape. It begins with Geralt walking along a narrow dirt trail flanked by tall pine trees, where moonlight filters through the canopy toward distant rocky formations. As he continues, the forest opens slightly into a clearing where a group of startled deer leaps across the path from right to left and vanishes into the vegetation. The scene then shifts as the trail transitions from the wooded area into a more mountainous terrain, with large stone cliffs and walls rising sharply on the right. Finally, the vegetation becomes sparser as the path winds further into the rocky outcrops under the dark night sky.
